---
title: "John Lock Bargus"
---

## John Lock Bargus

**Dates:** 1762/3-1786

### Description

great-uncle of CMY

### Biography

Son of Richard Bargus and Ann Lock, and half-brother of CMY’s grandfather the Rev. Thomas Bargus. CMY in Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 6 states that he died in the same epidemic as Lord Brooke (1772-1786), son of the 2nd Earl of Warwick and his first wife Georgiana Peachey (whose father Lord Selsey was Thomas Bargus’s patron).  John Lock Bargus appears in  Alumni Oxonienses and Register of Gray’s Inn.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
